subject: Monthly Financial Close Checklist - March 2026
body:
Accounting Team,

Reminder: March close is also quarter-end. Additional items beyond standard monthly close:

Standard Close (Due: April 3rd):
- [ ] Bank reconciliations (all 6 accounts)
- [ ] Credit card statement reconciliation
- [ ] Intercompany eliminations
- [ ] Accrued liabilities review
- [ ] Prepaid expense amortization
- [ ] Fixed asset depreciation

Quarter-End Additions (Due: April 7th):
- [ ] Inventory count and valuation adjustment
- [ ] Bad debt reserve analysis (current AR aging: $2.1M over 90 days)
- [ ] Deferred revenue waterfall update
- [ ] Goodwill impairment assessment
- [ ] Quarterly board financial package preparation
- [ ] Tax provision calculation

Please flag any issues by April 1st so we can address them before the hard close.

Remember: No journal entries after April 7th without CFO approval.
